message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The shell is responsive. /app/solution.txt still contains noisy partial typed prefixes and game-output artifacts. Previous cleanup attempts did not visibly finish or verify. We should first back up the noisy file, then run a stricter cleanup script that collapses consecutive prefix fragments and filters non-move lines, and inspect the result before deciding whether a fresh OCR extraction is needed.",
  "plan": "Copy the current solution to /app/solution.txt.bak. Then write and run /tmp/strict_clean.py, which cleans prompt artifacts, collapses consecutive prefixes into the longest variant, filters out game-output/artifacts, and writes /app/solution.txt. Finally inspect line count plus head and tail to verify the cleaned output.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cp /app/solution.txt /app/solution.txt.bak
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/strict_clean.py <<'PY'
import re

INP='/app/solution.txt.bak'
OUT='/app/solution.txt'
with open(INP) as f:
    raw=[line.rstrip('\n') for line in f]

def is_game_output(s):
    low=s.lower()
    phrases=[
        'done.', 'taken.', 'you are', 'you hear', 'you see', 'there is', 'there are',
        'on the ground', 'suspicious-looking', 'stiletto', 'scream', 'butt',
        'this is', 'it is', 'can be seen', 'strange passage', 'cyclops room',
        'slide room', 'mine entrance', 'squeaky room', 'white cliffs beach',
        'damp cave', 'loud room', 'treasure room', 'jewel-encrusted', 'platinum bar',
        'silver chalice', 'the thief', 'deflates.', 'your own feet', 'heavy iron chain',
        'end of the chain', 'three sides', 'more', 'at the end of',
        'room score', 'moves:', 'revision', 'serial number', 'copyright',
        'zork i:', 'infocom', 'all rights reserved', 'west of house',
        'staircase to the', 'reservoir', 'southeast.', 'cin>', 'cind', 'cin',
        'wind can', 'wind canar', 'wind canary', '1s a suspicious', 'suspicious—'
    ]
    return any(ph in low for ph in phrases)

def clean_cmd(s):
    s=s.replace('»','>').replace('_','').replace('|','')
    s=re.sub(r'^[>\s]+','',s)
    s=s.strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'[\\|_]+$','',s).strip()
    s=s.rstrip('.')
    return s

def is_valid_move(s):
    if not s or is_game_output(s): return False
    low=s.lower()
    if re.fullmatch(r'(n|s|e|w|u|d|ne|nw|se|sw)', low): return True
    if len(low) > 60 or re.search(r'\d{4,}', low): return False
    parts=low.split()
    if not parts: return False
    verbs={'get','take','drop','put','open','close','light','kill','slay','move','push','pull',
           'set','raise','lower','wave','dig','shove','give','wind','pray','save','look',
           'inventory','read','rub','climb','pour','fill','blow','throw','attack','drink',
           'eat','count','wait','board','disembark','launch','land','unwrap','tie','untie',
           'turn','press','type','enter','go','examine','lock','unlock','inflate','deflate',
           'pump','squeeze','touch','kick','jump','swim','cross','leave','follow','shoot',
           'solve','ring'}
    return parts[0] in verbs

collapsed=[]
for line in raw:
    c=clean_cmd(line)
    if not c: continue
    if collapsed and (c.lower().startswith(collapsed[-1].lower()) or collapsed[-1].lower().startswith(c.lower())):
        if len(c) >= len(collapsed[-1]):
            collapsed[-1]=c
    else:
        collapsed.append(c)

final=[]
for c in collapsed:
    if not is_valid_move(c): continue
    if final and c.lower() == final[-1].lower(): continue
    final.append(c)

with open(OUT,'w') as f:
    for m in final:
        f.write(m+'\n')

print('raw lines', len(raw))
print('collapsed', len(collapsed))
print('final moves', len(final))
for i,m in enumerate(final,1):
    print(i,m)
PY
python3 /tmp/strict_clean.py
",
      "duration": 5.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- cleaned solution ---'; wc -l /app/solution.txt; head -80 /app/solution.txt; echo '--- tail ---'; tail -40 /app/solution.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
